libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Use local test setup: create a Vertx instance, start an in-process HttpServer on 127.0.0.1 with an ephemeral port, create WebClient/WebClientSession/CachingWebClient against it, and close WebClient, server, and Vertx in cleanup. Do not depend on public external HTTP services. For nativeTest on JDK 25/current-defaults, extend the existing runtime argument setup to 5.0.1 as well: add -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: OAuth2WebClient references optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 types; avoid OAuth2-specific coverage unless adding that optional dependency is intentionally in scope.
Native Image verification remains authoritative; the Netty/JDK 25 flags are advisory based on the resolved Netty 4.2.2.Final dependency and existing 5.0.0 setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Vert.x Web Client can be meaningfully exercised with an in-process Vert.x HTTP server and no Docker or extra required Maven dependency, but version 5.0.1 still resolves Netty 4.2.2.Final and needs the same Java 25 native-run system properties already used for 5.0.0.
